scope: Deterministic functional gate for a knowledge + linter skill. This is NOT a paired with-skill/baseline LLM latency/cost benchmark; see notes for why that was retired for this artifact type.

skeleton_placeholder_lint.reason: raw template must not pass as a finished RFP

notes: rfp-architect is knowledge + a deterministic Python linter; its release gate is the deterministic functional suite above. The prior 'full paired with-skill/baseline benchmark before publication' requirement is retired as not applicable to this artifact type — there is no LLM inference in the gated path, so latency/token deltas were never instrumented and would have been fabricated. See references/readiness_report.md.

Qualitative baseline (no skill): models commonly omit Taiwan local clauses (資安分級 / 禁陸製 / 資料落地) and evaluation legality (價格 20–50%, 評選委員會 組成). With skill: fixed 11-section anatomy + clause library (A–R) + evaluation-legality + linter gate.
